meaning: n.彩色蜡笔,彩色蜡笔画adj.彩色蜡笔的,柔和的
examples: She's always in perfect suits, you know, pastel colors, all matching.
The movie features lots of soft fabrics, pastel colors and delicate floral prints.
When nursery colors were introduced, pink was actually considered the more masculine color, a pastel version of red, which was associated with strength.
Pastel de papas is a potato pie made with milk, eggs, cheese and aniseed.
You'd think that cool soups, pastel-pale or jewel-bright, would be everybody's fallback food for summer.
